title: Smoky Flaky Croatian Branston-pickle Gratin
description: A rich and savory dish featuring the tangy flavors of branston-pickle, perfect for a festive gathering.
instructions: Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a copper pot over low heat.
Add the chopped Branston pickle and cook, stirring occasionally, until caramelized.
Stir in the flour and cook for 1 minute.
Slowly pour in the heavy cream, whisking continuously to prevent lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened.
Remove from heat and stir in the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Stir in the Parmesan cheese until melted.
Stir in the egg yolks and cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and smooth the top.
Dust with flour and dot with the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
